case_title: ROSA RAMIREZ et al VS. MARITZA ZAPATA et al

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RAMIREZ, ROSA HERNANDEZ, JUAN CARLOS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ZAPATA, MARITZA TIJERINO, OCTAVIO $2,600.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,600.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
NOTICE OF APPEAL FILED BY APPELLANT ZAPATA, MARITZA TIJERINO, OCTAVIO MAILED TO RESPONDENT RAMIREZ, ROSA HERNANDEZ, JUAN CARLOS
RECORD REMANDED TO SMALL CLAIMS (NO EXHIBITS RETURNED TO SMALL CLAIMS DIVISION)

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF JUL-18-2011 IS CONTINUED STIPULATION OF THE PARTIES TO JUL-25-2011 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFFS. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT MARITZA ZAPATA ONLY, WHO WAS NOT NOTICED FOR THE ORDER OF EXAMINATION. DEFENDANT MARITZA ZAPATA PRESENTS THE PLAINTIFFS WITH A BANK OF AMERICAN CASHIERS CHECK IN THE AMOUNT OF 2600.00 TODAY. CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT, FOR CASHIERS CHECK TO CLEAR PLAINTIFFS BANK ACCOUNT. IF NO APPEARANCE, THE ORDER OF EXAMINATION WILL BE DISCHARGED. PLAINTIFFS ARE ADVISED THAT THEY SHOULD FILE A SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT WITH THE COURT. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Apr-27-2011 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 9:12 am
JPT Jason Jungreis, clerk Annie Pascual, nothing on record, dept. 414.
Cause called for Small Claims Appeal. Appellant, Maritza Zapata and Octavio Tijerino present in pro per. Court Interpreter Marta Riesen interprets Spanish/English and English/Spanish on behalf of Appellants. Respondent, Rosa Ramirez and Juan Carlos Hernandez present in pro per. Court Interpreter Ellen Rosenthal interprets Spanish/English and English/Spanish on behalf of Respondents. Parties, previously sworn, testify in the narrative and respond to questions from JPT Jungreis.
